response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scene Mapping: Introduced Pekora's merch segment (00:00-03:36) and two singing segments (03:36-04:02 and 04:26-04:54). 2. Song identification: Extracted 'Usada no Tamashii o' from the lyrics display and 'SANADANCE 戦CISE' from the song title graphic. 3. Search Strategy: Used ' "兎田の魂を" Japanese and English lyrics' and ' "SANADANCE 戦CISE" Japanese and English lyrics' to locate information. 4. Data Extraction: Transcribed Japanese lyrics from the video/search results and provided English translations.
response.global_summary: A short video featuring Usada Pekora introducing merchandise followed by two musical performances. The first song, 'Usada no Tamashii o', is a custom anniversary song, and the second is 'SANADANCE 戦CISE' from the Masamune 3 slot machine soundtrack.

scenes.description: Usada Pekora performs the song 'Usada no Tamashii o' on stage, with lyrics appearing on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
仮想の世に生まれ 生きること
即ち 戦い、勝つこと
時代と戦い
己が宿命と戦い
己自身に打ち勝つ
いつの世も大差はなし
人の生き様が
一瞬の煌めきが
歴史を紡いでいく
今こそ胸に刻め
我が生き様を！
永久に語り継げ
兎田の魂を
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Born in a virtual world, to live
Is to fight and win
Fight against the era
Fight against one's own fate
Overcome oneself
In any age, there is no big difference
The way people live
The fleeting sparkle
Spins history
Now, engrave it in your heart
My way of life!
Keep telling it forever
The soul of Usada!

scenes.description: Usada Pekora performs 'SANADANCE 戦CISE' on stage, with backup dancers.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
回せ！ しゃがめ！ 伸ばせ！ 空に叫べ！
SANADANCE 戦CISE!
Wow Wow Wow…
苦しい時や辛い時には 体動かせよ
SANADANCE
天上天下 唯我独尊 みんなで踊ろうぜ
SANADANCE
Let’s Go! Take A Chance! Change the world!
深呼吸 Ba Hoooooo!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Spin it! Crouch! Extend it! Shout to the sky!
SANADANCE 戦CISE!
Wow Wow Wow…
When times are tough or painful, move your body!
SANADANCE
The world is mine alone, let's dance together!
SANADANCE
Let’s Go! Take A Chance! Change the world!
Deep breath, Ba Hoooooo!
